UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the fiery inspiration, creative energy, and magnetic presence of Brigid as the Queen of Wands.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the black cat or salamanders; they are merely symbols accompanying the central theme.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Queen of Wands card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic ambient orchestral, violins, harp, flute, uilleann pipes, upbeat, triumphant, majestic, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the wilted sunflower, the bristling cat, and the smug expression on the hostess's face.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the throne or the faded petals as they may distract from the main message of vanity and superficiality.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Queen of Wands card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic, Orchestral, Ambient, Strings, Harp, Reversed, Queen, Wands, Growth, Potential, Stability, Opportunity, Minor, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Queen of Wands card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the powerful, alluring presence of Morgan le Fay, her crossed stance, and the mysterious, uneven growth of sunflower petals.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the missing cat or the imperfection in the wand's growth.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Queen of Wands card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, violins, harp, flute, strings ensemble, uilleann pipes, ethereal, triumphant, majestic, instrumental
